title: Decline in Saudi Oil Flows to China in Q2 2025
section_path: Decline in Saudi Oil Flows to China in Q2 2025
section_path_text: Decline in Saudi Oil Flows to China in Q2 2025
summary:
Main
Tanker - Weekly Market Monitor
Snapshot of Crude and Product Freight Rates, Supply-Demand
Week 19, 08 May, 2025
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2025-05-09 111955.png | assets/2025-05-09_decline-in-saudi-oil-flows-to-china-in-q2-2025_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_2199bf95cbfb.png
In the second quarter of 2025, oil flows from Saudi Arabia to China declined sharply. This downturn can be attributed to a combination of seasonal and structural factors. Notably, Chinese refineries traditionally undergo scheduled maintenance during Q2, particularly in April and May.
